zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS於1270年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Raoul II of Clermont25歲，母親Alix de Dreux15歲。她和Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE至少有1個女兒。她去世於1320年在法國享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS于1270年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特时，她的父亲Raoul II of Clermont25岁，母亲Alix de Dreux15岁。她和Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE至少有1个女儿。她去世于1320年在法国享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CLERMONT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: en
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 岑, referring to ‘small high hills’ or ‘precipice’ in Chinese: (i) from the placename Cen (岑), the name of a fief (located in Hancheng in present-day Shaanxi province), which was granted to Qu, nephew of King Wen of Zhou (1152–1056 BC ), by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (ii) for some families, this surname can be traced back to certain minority ethnic groups in ancient southern China.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS was born in 1270, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Raoul II of Clermont, was 25 and her mother, Alix de Dreux, was 15. She had at least 1 daughter with Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. She died in 1320, in France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS est née en 1270, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Raoul II of Clermont, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. Elle est décédée en 1320, à France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS 1270 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul II of Clermont 25 und ihre Mutter Alix de Dreux 15. Sie hatte mit Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS è nata il nel 1270 nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Raoul II of Clermont, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. Morì nel 1320, nel Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISISが1270年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Raoul II of Clermontは25歳，母Alix de Dreuxは15歳であった。彼女はGuillaume VI de DAMPIERREとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1320年にフランスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS(이)가 1270년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul II of Clermont(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 프랑스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS nasceu em 1270, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Raoul II of Clermont, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. Ela faleceu em 1320, em França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS родилась в 1270 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul II of Clermont было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 15. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS nació en 1270, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Raoul II of Clermont, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Guillaume VI de DAMPIERRE. Murió en 1320, en Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
